name: Suspected Ransomware Execution
description: Early containment of a suspected ransomware execution — network isolation, credential rotation, backup preservation, and evidence collection before encryption spreads.

steps.name: Confirm ransomware indicators — do not reboot
steps.description: Verify the alert: look for ransom note, encrypted file extensions, vssadmin delete shadows, and suspicious process trees. DO NOT reboot — memory forensics may be possible.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would review EDR telemetry for file extension changes, shadow copy deletion, and process execution from temp/appdata paths.

steps.name: Network isolate the affected host(s)
steps.description: Cut the host from the network immediately to stop lateral spread. Use EDR host isolation or VLAN quarantine. Maintain agent comms for response.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would trigger EDR network containment on affected host(s). Host loses network but EDR channel stays active.

steps.name: Preserve memory and volatile data
steps.description: If tools are available, capture a memory image before any remediation. Also collect: running processes, network connections, and open file handles.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would run live response to pull process list, netstat, and initiate memory capture via EDR or WinPMEM.

steps.name: Verify backup integrity — DO NOT restore yet
steps.description: Check that backups for affected systems exist, are recent, and have not themselves been encrypted or deleted by the ransomware. Document backup age.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would check backup system for most recent clean backup timestamps. Verify backup storage is not accessible from affected host.

steps.name: Reset credentials for accounts active on affected host
steps.description: Rotate passwords and invalidate tokens for all accounts that had active sessions on the isolated host. Assume credentials harvested.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would identify accounts logged in during infection window and trigger forced password reset + session revocation for each.

rollback.note: Users re-verify identity before new credentials issued.

steps.name: Hunt for lateral movement from patient zero
steps.description: Search SIEM/EDR for evidence of lateral movement: PsExec, WMI, SMB file copies, pass-the-hash from the initial infected host to other systems.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would run lateral movement hunt queries across SIEM for the 48h window before isolation.

steps.name: Identify and preserve the ransomware binary
steps.description: Locate the ransomware executable, hash it (SHA-256), and submit to VirusTotal. Preserve for malware analysis. Do not delete yet.
steps.dry_run_preview: Would extract binary from EDR quarantine, compute SHA-256, and attach to case evidence.

evidence_checklist: Ransom note text and file path
First encrypted file timestamp and extension
